title: Plutarch, Moralia: The Dinner of the Seven Wise Men
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: The Dinner of the Seven Wise Men.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: The Dinner of the Seven Wise Men.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'The Dinner of the Seven Wise Men': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
